title: 🫁 Lung Cancer Global Clinical & Risk Factor Dataset (2015–2025)
subtitle: A Comprehensive Multi-Year, Multi-Region Dataset for Lung Cancer Analysis & Prediction
description: This dataset contains 1,500 patient records spanning 2015–2025 across all 6 WHO regions and 60 countries, with detailed clinical, demographic, lifestyle, genetic, and diagnostic information related to lung cancer. The data is inspired by WHO fact sheets and global cancer research statistics (GLOBOCAN 2020). It covers risk factors (smoking, occupational hazards, air pollution, genetics), symptoms, cancer types (NSCLC/SCLC with subtypes), staging, tumor size, metastasis, diagnosis methods, treatment modalities, and survival outcomes. Ideal for EDA, ML classification, survival analysis, geographic trend analysis, and public health research.

source.note: This is a synthetic dataset created for educational and research purposes, inspired by real-world statistics and clinical patterns.

feature_descriptions.WHO_Region: WHO region (Africa, Americas, South-East Asia, Europe, Eastern Mediterranean, Western Pacific)
feature_descriptions.Country: Country of origin (60 countries across all WHO regions)
feature_descriptions.Smoking_Status: Current Smoker / Former Smoker / Never Smoked
feature_descriptions.Cigarettes_Per_Day: Average cigarettes smoked per day (0 for non-smokers)
feature_descriptions.Occupational_Hazard: Exposure to workplace carcinogens like asbestos, chemicals (Yes/No)
feature_descriptions.Chronic_Lung_Disease: History of chronic lung diseases like COPD (Yes/No)
feature_descriptions.Cancer_Type: Type of lung cancer (NSCLC - Non-Small Cell / SCLC - Small Cell)
feature_descriptions.NSCLC_Subtype: NSCLC subtype (Adenocarcinoma / Squamous Cell / Large Cell / Not Applicable for SCLC)
feature_descriptions.Cancer_Stage: Cancer stage at diagnosis (Stage I / II / III / IV)
feature_descriptions.Tumor_Size_cm: Tumor size in centimeters at diagnosis
feature_descriptions.Diagnosis_Method: Method used for diagnosis (CT Scan / PET Scan / Biopsy / Bronchoscopy / LDCT Screening / Chest X-Ray / MRI)
feature_descriptions.Treatment: Primary treatment modality (Surgery / Chemotherapy / Radiotherapy / Immunotherapy / Targeted Therapy / Chemo + Radiation / Surgery + Chemotherapy / Palliative Care)

lung_cancer_facts.leading_cause: Lung cancer is the #1 cause of cancer-related deaths worldwide
lung_cancer_facts.annual_deaths: ~1.8 million deaths globally (18% of all cancer deaths) - GLOBOCAN 2020
lung_cancer_facts.smoking_attribution: ~85% of lung cancer cases are attributed to smoking
lung_cancer_facts.types: NSCLC (~85% of cases) and SCLC (~15% of cases)
lung_cancer_facts.5_year_survival: Overall 5-year survival rate is ~22% (varies significantly by stage)

usage_suggestions: 📊 Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA) - Understand risk factor distributions
🤖 Machine Learning Classification - Predict survival outcomes
📈 Survival Analysis - Kaplan-Meier curves by treatment/stage
🔬 Feature Importance Analysis - Identify key predictors
🌍 Geographic Analysis - Compare cancer patterns across countries
🧬 Genetic Mutation Analysis - Study mutation-treatment relationships
🏥 Clinical Decision Support - Treatment outcome analysis
